title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: self-host LLMs (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) behind a simple REST/CLI API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client/SDK for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, push, list models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same features as Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models for chat, tools, embeddings.

title: llama-index-integrations/llms/ollama
summary: LlamaIndex LLM and embeddings connector for local Ollama models.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, PDF, RAG, user auth, dark mode).

title: open-webui
summary: Successor to ollama-webui; open-source ChatGPT-style interface for Ollama.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI for chatting with Ollama models, history, syntax highlight.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama completions inline like GitHub Copilot.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama server on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & CUDA) published to Docker Hub.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator & OllamaEmbedder components.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Minimal Streamlit app showing RAG with Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB.

title: ollama-nomic-embeddings
summary: Nomic Embeddings adapter for Ollama; exposes `nomic-embed-text` model.

title: ollama-tools
summary: Experimental repo showing function-calling pattern with Ollama chat API.

title: ollama-gptcli
summary: Terminal chat UI inspired by gpt-cli but powered by local Ollama models.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that chats and generates images via Ollama endpoints.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app integrating Ollama completions into channels/DMs.

title: ollama-macos-menu
summary: Native macOS menu-bar app to start/stop Ollama server and switch models.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for local AI autocomplete, summarization, and note Q&A via Ollama.
